name: Chains of Command
entries: Breaking the Supply Lines of the Temple and the Crimson Reapers

name: Introduction
entries: The adventurers have uncovered critical intelligence about Commander Feldrin, the ruthless overseer of the Temple of Elemental Evil's supply operations, who manages a complex logistical web feeding the Greater Temple's sinister ambitions. Operating alongside Feldrin is the Crimson Reapers mercenary group, led by the mage-bandit Rom Khavernus, whose brigands terrorize local roads, delivering prisoners and contraband directly into Temple hands.

Yet Feldrin's network extends deeper into Nulb itself. Mistress Selentis, the cunning logistics overseer operating from the Old Mayor's Manor, coordinates crucial shipments between pirates, smugglers, and the Greater Temple, manipulating local factions and maintaining the fragile balance of power. Meanwhile, Lucius Graeme, Hedrack's trusted courier, ensures orders and intelligence flow smoothly between Hedrack, Feldrin, and Selentis.

With the Temple's reach expanding rapidly into the Viscounty of Verbobonc, the adventurers must quickly disrupt this logistical web, creating internal turmoil, the Temple's unity, and crippling its war machine.

entries.name: Infiltrate the Waterside Hostel and Identify Crimson Reapers Brigand Network
entries: Objective: Obtain critical intelligence from Rom Khavernus or his agents regarding the nature and timing of Temple shipments and identify his connections to Mistress Selentis and Feldrin.

entries.name: Disrupt Mistress Selentis's Operations at the Old Mayor's Manor
entries: Objective: Sabotage Selentis's key logistical hub. Destroy records, intercept slave transfers, disrupt financial exchanges, and eliminate or capture Selentis's men to paralyze her role in the Temple.

entries.name: Sabotage the Boatman's Warehouse, Nulb Pier
entries: Objective: Destroy pirate-held goods, weapons caches, and slave holding areas. Capture or eliminate key pirate figures to sever the river-based supply chain into Nulb.

entries.name: Disable the Wainwright Transport Hub
entries: Objective: Destroy supply wagons and confiscate shipment records; eliminating Maddok cripples overland routes connecting bandit raids directly to Feldrin's forces.

entries.name: Destroy the Hunting Cottage and Secret Tunnel Relay Point
entries: Objective: Sabotage the secure relay point, collapse the hidden tunnel linking directly to the Greater Temple, and neutralize Gefreid Patris to disrupt Feldrin's supply corridor.

entries.name: Capture or Eliminate Commander Feldrin
entries: Objective: Removing Commander Feldrin eliminates a key Temple strategist and severely disrupts logistics coordination.

entries.name: Challenge
entries: Dick Rentsch's wary guards and informants; navigating hostile bandit regulars loyal to Rom Khavernus.

entries.name: Opportunities
entries: Valuable intelligence about Selentis's operations, Feldrin's schedules, and Rom's connection to the Temple.

entries.name: Challenge
entries: Madame Selentis's disciplined bandit enforcers; magical defenses and concealed documents detailing supply chain operations.

entries.name: Opportunities
entries: Crucial records and prisoner locations; potential to turn Selentis's lieutenants against her through bribery or threats.

entries.name: Challenge
entries: Pirate crews under Vesrek and Tolub; heavily fortified warehouses.

entries.name: Opportunities
entries: Sever river-based smuggling routes, gain vital documents connecting pirates to the Temple's leadership.

entries.name: Challenge
entries: Maddok's violent bandit guards and security measures; booby-trapped storage yards.

entries.name: Opportunities
entries: Disrupt key overland supply routes; seize shipment manifests revealing Feldrin's next moves.

entries.name: Hunting Cottage and Secret Tunnel (Gefreid Patris)
Challenge
entries: Heavily guarded by Greater Temple bandits, traps, dire hounds, bugbear/goblin guards in the tunnel, and giant rats near the secret well entrance.

entries.name: Opportunities
entries: Destroy the main relay point between Feldrin's operations and the Greater Temple's lower levels, permanently disrupting supply lines.

entries.name: Internal Chaos
entries: Successfully disrupting supply chains and eliminating key figures like Feldrin or Selentis creates power vacuums and intensified factional infighting within the Temple.

entries.name: Increased Resistance
entries: Surviving leaders, including Smigmal and Lucius, rallying surviving forces to retaliate against the adventurers, increasing the danger of future engagements.
"Pirates, bandits, priests—we're all chained together by coin. The only freedom left in Nulb is choosing who holds your leash."
— Lodriss, Proprietor of the Boatman's Tavern
